spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for Leaderboard/Data, Bento Grid for Marketing/Hero sections
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing: use p-6 or p-8 for cards. p-12, p-20, or p-24 for section padding.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-border, subtle rounding (max rounded-sm or rounded-none) for a sharp, technical SaaS feel.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover state: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-border/80 transition-all duration-300.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px border-b border-border/40. Fixed top-0 z-50.
surface_strategies.footer: High contrast shift: Dark footer (bg-[#09090B] text-white) to anchor the page, py-20 spacing.

components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm, high contrast. Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90. Secondary: bg-secondary text-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80. Active state: scale-95.
components.leaderboard: List format with strict grid hierarchy. Dense and compact spacing (gap-4). Flex container for each row with fixed width for upvotes.
components.project_card: Grid layout. Project icon/image on left. 1px border. Upvote button distinct and clickable on the right. Combined score visible.
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized: flat inputs, 1px border, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary.
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs for Weekly/Monthly/All-time leaderboard toggle. Clean underline style or segmented control style.

motion_and_interactions.global_animation: Smooth fade + slide-in on scroll across all pages. (Framer Motion `whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-50px' }}`).
motion_and_interactions.hero: Bold parallax + staggered reveals for typography and main CTA.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states ensuring contrast (e.g., hover:bg-secondary hover:text-foreground).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Upvote button should have a quick scale bounce animation on click.

image_urls.description: Abstract tech/code background, minimal and clean, suitable for hero sections or landing page accents
Abstract liquid/geometric minimal art for default project covers and screenshots
Clean portrait for default user avatars
Minimal workspace desk for empty states (e.g. no projects found)

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="upvote-button"`, `data-testid="project-card"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion @phosphor-icons/react clsx tailwind-merge`.
Configure `tailwind.config.js` with the specified colors (primary: #FF4500, background: #FFFFFF, foreground: #09090B). Set border radius to 0.125rem (rounded-sm) globally.
Use @fontsource/outfit for headings and @fontsource/dm-sans for body text.
Build the Hero section with Framer Motion for bold parallax and staggered reveals of typography.
Implement the Leaderboard prominently on the main page. Include tabs (Weekly/Monthly/All-time) using customized Shadcn Tabs. Calculate ranking using combined score (upvotes + views + comments).
Develop Hacker Profiles, Auth pages, and a multi-step Project Submission form.
Ensure the Project Detail page uses structured data visualization (tech stack bento grid, large screenshots, tags).
Integrate Framer Motion `whileInView` for smooth fade + slide-in on scroll on all feed items and page sections.
Do NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' strategy for the top navigation header.
